---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new pattern, template, or documentation improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: type:feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this be implemented? (templates, docs, scripts, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Security Layer

Which security layer does this relate to?

- [ ] Storage-native (ARP, FPolicy, SnapLock, MAV)
- [ ] File scanning (TrendAI, Deep Instinct)
- [ ] Event-driven response
- [ ] Observability
- [ ] Data protection
- [ ] Other / Cross-cutting

## Additional Context

Any diagrams, references, or related issues.
